说明: 肖敏：同班女同学；普通座位邻感、爱刷手机嘴快无坏心；课桌边、放学路制造「被听见一角」。
阵容外貌: 校服套装、灰百褶裙；蓝领结、长发与发卡

固化.画风与质量: masterpiece, best quality, very aesthetic, ultra detailed, depth of field, 8k uhd
固化.身材与体态: teen girl, slim, small breasts, student body, natural proportions
固化.容貌与发型: asian, playful dark eyes, black hair, long straight hair with hairpin, light lip tint, fair skin, 17 years old, aged up high school student, not child
固化.气质与年龄感: chatty classmate, phone in hand energy, friendly gossip, not loli

服装固化._注释: cg.py 按此顺序拼成固定 outfit tags，置于 cg_scene 之前；LLM 严禁在 cg_scene 中重写服装
服装固化.上衣: school blazer, white dress shirt, blue neck ribbon bow, modest
服装固化.配饰: phone charm on student bag strap, simple hairpin
服装固化.锁定约束: fully clothed, consistent outfit, same clothes, school uniform

场景固化._注释: 每张 CG 都会加在 cg_scene 之后，固化画风氛围，不含服装
场景固化.通用: cinematic lighting, film grain, bokeh, professional photography, high detail face, perfect detailed eyes, realistic iris and pupils

负面提示词_通用: lowres, worst quality, low quality, bad anatomy, bad hands, deformed, extra limbs, blurry, jpeg artifacts, watermark, text, signature, logo, censored, bar censor, mosaic censor, extra fingers, missing fingers, bad proportions, bad perspective
负面提示词_外貌纠错: blonde hair, blue eyes, green eyes, child, loli, shota, toddler face, baby face, elementary school, petite child, muscular female, old woman, wrinkled face, grey hair, white hair, bald, heavy makeup cleavage, 2girls, multiple girls, multiple people, male, man, deformed eyes, weird eyes, crossed eyes, mismatched eyes, blurry eyes, empty eyes, doll eyes, anime eyes, cartoony eyes, plastic eyes
负面提示词_服装纠错: different outfit, outfit change, casual streetwear, bikini, swimsuit, nude, naked, topless, pantless, jeans, shorts, teacher suit
